_doc: warrant REFERENCE policy — neutral defaults. NOT authoritative: each consuming team supplies its own <team>/policy.json (the namespace-relative type→authority map + domain config) and runs the reference engine with --policy pointing at it. With no policy + no domain config, the reference engine runs the generic checks only (frontmatter / required fields / type-known / authority-map / parents-exist / inversion / findings-bar / convergence-field) and skips the domain-specific ones (leaf-ref, sync-coverage) and registry-validation when their sources are absent.
